probes.name: region-tables-migrated
probes.description: The `regions` table exists + carries the latest schema version. Failure indicates a missed migration.

probes.name: region-country-defaults-loaded
probes.description: `data/country-defaults.json` parses cleanly + contains at minimum the fallback country_code (default 'US'). Failure indicates a corrupted deploy artifact.

probes.name: region-tenant-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every `regions.tenant_id` resolves to a live `tenants` row. Failure indicates orphaned rows after out-of-band tenant manipulation. The FK is onDelete=cascade so the DB should never permit orphans; this probe catches direct SQL manipulation.

probes.name: region-default-invariant
probes.description: Every tenant with at least one active Region has EXACTLY ONE row with `is_default = true`. Failure is a data-quality signal; the observer normally prevents this state, but the probe catches drift from bulk-imports + direct SQL. Runs a limited-cost aggregate query.

probes.name: region-slug-uniqueness
probes.description: No two active Regions share (tenant_id, slug). Backed by the partial unique index; the probe verifies the index is in place + healthy.

probes.name: region-tax-config-shape
probes.description: Every Region.tax_config JSONB blob validates against `schemas/region.schema.json#/properties/tax_config`. Catches drift from raw SQL edits + migration bugs. Runs against a sampled 100-row window per invocation.

probes.name: region-purge-queue-drained
probes.description: No `PurgeArchivedRegionsJob` has been pending for > 48h. Catches queue stalls that could push an archived Region past its 730-day retention window.

probes.name: region-inbound-fk-drift
probes.description: No Branch / Membership / Transaction / Invoice row references a hard-deleted Region (i.e. a Region row that no longer exists). Every FK is RESTRICT so this should never happen — this probe catches direct SQL manipulation.
